description:
De Companjie Guesthouse - Where Time Stands Still:

Exclusive Joint Mandate

There’s something magical about places that carry the whispers of time.
Nestled beneath the shade of centuries-old oak trees, this 1832 national heritage guesthouse tells a story of elegance, love, and timeless South African charm.

Every detail feels intentional — the creak of the original yellowwood floors, the glow of antique Oregon beams, and the sense of calm that lingers in every room. Guests arrive as travelers but leave as storytellers, drawn in by the soul and beauty of Swellendam, the third-oldest town in the country.

This fully furnished and operational property holds consent use for both a Guest House and a Restaurant, offering the perfect turnkey opportunity for hospitality entrepreneurs or investors seeking a business with heritage, heart, and history.

Designed with comfort and functionality in mind, the layout thoughtfully separates private and guest areas. The main dwelling features two en-suite bedrooms on the upper level for owners or managers, while a guest suite on the lower level ensures effortless hosting. Four additional suites are annexed to the main house, three of which offer private off-street entrances, each opening onto an enclosed garden and lapa with a built-in braai — ideal for outdoor entertaining.

The property also features a fully appointed kitchen, thoughtfully designed for both daily living and guest service, complete with all essential appliances, cookware, and utensils. A separate scullery adds convenience and functionality, while a versatile outbuilding houses a dedicated laundry area, making operations seamless and effortless.

Guests can enjoy elegant communal spaces including a dedicated breakfast room, formal dining area, study, and guest restroom, all designed to complement the building’s original character while offering modern convenience.

With seven en-suite guest rooms, each uniquely styled with luxurious finishes and king-size beds, De Companjie blends nostalgia with contemporary comfort. Landscaped gardens and charming outdoor seating create a tranquil haven where history and hospitality meet.

This is more than a guesthouse.
It’s a living legacy — ready for its next chapter and its next custodian. 

Arrange a private viewing today and experience the magic of De Companjie for yourself.

Price excludes VAT.

descriptionHeader: 4 Bedroom New House in Kleinmond
description:
A newly build house in Mountain Avenues with top quality finishes. It is centrally located and walking distance to all shops, beach, mountain and golf course. The house is an entertainers dream, large open plan living areas fitted with vinyl floors. Walking through the large sliding doors you will find an outdoor braai with a large patio and mountain views. There are four bedrooms fitted with lots of cupboards. The kitchen is fitted with a Defy oven ,hob and Elica Extractor fan. The kitchen has lots of cupboards and an island fitted with Eezi Quartz tops and in the scullery there are a double underslung Franki basin and Meissen taps.  The house has 1 full en-suite,1 guest bathroom and another en-suite batroom. Fibre is already installed with a router and the Wifi is on a 24 month contract that needs to be transferred onto the new owner's name. There is an alarm system that is enabled on the wifi and can be controlled with remotes or via app on your phone. The 200l geyser is connected to a Heat pump that is low on energy.  Bonus is free water for your grass and connect your own water pump to water line in storm water pipe.. The sewerage is connected to a septic tank.
 The double garage is larger than average and have Aluminium doors that can be operated with remotes or via an app on cellphone. The plot is also larger than your average plot in Kleinmond.  House is NHBRC registered.
The db is solar/inverter ready, so the owner can add a solar system easily to the DB board for an added cost, depending on the size of the system needed.
Galvanised gates still needs to be fitted on front wall 
Kleinmond is situated in the heart of the Cape Floral kingdom and is surrounded by the Kogelberg Biosphere Reserve (containing 1 400 species of fynbos) which is the first Biosphere in South Africa to be proclaimed by United Nations’ Educational, Scientific and Cultural Organization (UNESCO). There are over 1 500 different plant species here, 150 of which are endemic, occurring nowhere else in the world.

descriptionHeader: House for sale with both sea and mountain view in betty’s bay
description:
This house, built and with first occupancy in 2003 is situated above Clarence Drive at the foothills of the Kogelberg Mountains, which embrace the Kogelberg Biosphere Reserve. It encompasses a large open plan dining room and lounge area. The kitchen flowing from here leads onto a covered patio with a large "Jet Master" type double-door de luxe built-in braai. The house further comprises of 3 bedrooms, with the main being an en-suite with a walk-through double-sided built-in closet leading to a fully tiled bathroom consisting of bath, basin, and shower. There are also built-in window boxes leading from the basin wall around the bath, ending at the shower wall. The other 2 bedrooms share a fully tiled family bathroom with a shower, bath, and basin. The TV room has been temporarily enclosed and currently serves as a third bedroom. It can, however, easily be reverted back to its original purpose. 

Further, leading from the en-suite sliding door, you enter the vast atrium. This area has an exit door to the side garden space bordering the en-suite bedroom window.  It also leads to a large laundry room in the far corner with a door leading to the garage. This can also be converted into another bedroom, as there is a toilet and basin in the garage space that the interleading door opens to. On the far side is a sliding door that takes you to the garage. The garage is 137.70m2 in extent with a storeroom against the far wall.  It was originally used as a workshop and has a car pit for mechanical vehicle maintenance. The garage can further accommodate up to 6 cars, if required. However, due to its size thereof it can easily be converted into either a complete flatlet with rental and/or Airbnb probability or serve as a living space for an adolescent or aged parents with close family ties. This house has huge potential for a buyer with a view to expanding horizons and is a must-see.
Contact me to arrange a viewing!

All of this is within walking distance of the Whale Coast Mall and other local amenities, making this home both convenient and desirable. Don't miss out on this rare opportunity to own a home in one of Sandbaai’s most tranquil and secure locations.

descriptionHeader: A Home Full of Character and Charm Near the Lagoon*
description:
**Exclusive Sole Mandate**
ON SHOW THIS SATURDAY, VIEW BY APPOINTMENT 12- 2 pm

From the moment you arrive, this property makes a statement. The fully paved entrance, adorned with an elegant infinity design, sets the tone for what lies beyond. Step into the expansive, established garden, where a magnificent 300-year-old fig tree stands proudly, creating a lush canopy and a thriving ecosystem alive with birdsong—a daily rhythm that brings nature right to your doorstep.

The heart of the home is warm and inviting. A kitchen with built-in cupboards flows seamlessly into the open-plan lounge area. The lounge is spacious and welcoming, anchored by a large fireplace with a cozy seating area—perfect for winter evenings. Doors open onto a secure patio, ideal for entertaining or enjoying quiet mornings, while ceiling fans throughout ensure year-round comfort.

Three bedrooms located on one side of the house provide restful retreats, with one currently serving as a tranquil meditation space. Two bathrooms, freshly repainted interiors, and thoughtful finishes add to the home’s appeal. Security is a priority, featuring an alarm system, burglar bars, and gates on all doors, while the nearby OPS security base ensures fast response times.

Modern sustainability is built in, with a fully paid R250,000 solar installation that includes Canadian panels, a Sunsynk inverter with app access, and expandable battery capacity. A new geyser and the option to reactivate electric fencing add further convenience.
On the garage side, practicality meets security. The double tandem garage, equipped with a carport, features solid wooden doors and a Trellidor pull-down gate, offering peace of mind. Inside, the garage is highly functional, with ample shelving and connections for a washing machine, tumble dryer, and freezers.

This property beautifully blends practicality with charm—from its secure garage and solar system to its lush garden and inviting lounge. It’s more than a home; it’s a lifestyle rooted in comfort, community, and respect for nature. Here, one golden rule applies: the trees stay, and the birds are always fed—the francolins will thank you.

descriptionHeader: Scenic Secure Living in Sought-After Larenbosch Estate
description:
Sole Mandate - Nestled in the highly sought-after Larenbosch Estate, this charming two-bedroom home offers a harmonious blend of comfort, security, and scenic beauty—ideal for relaxed retirement living.
The home features two well-sized bedrooms with built-in cupboards and a spacious bathroom, thoughtfully designed for easy living. The heart of the home is the open-plan living and dining area, enhanced by high vaulted ceilings that create a wonderful sense of space and light. A compact yet functional kitchen flows seamlessly with the living area, making everyday living and entertaining effortless.
Step outside to a built-in braai area, perfectly positioned for enjoying memorable get-togethers. Large sliding doors open up to breathtaking views of the surrounding winelands, with the mountains rising in the distance, creating a tranquil and picturesque setting.
The property also offers a single garage with ample storage, both to the front and side—ideal for hobbies, tools, or extra belongings.

Larenbosch Estate is renowned for its excellent security and beautifully maintained communal areas, complemented by a warm and welcoming community atmosphere. This makes it a particularly attractive choice for those seeking peace of mind and a relaxed lifestyle.
Located in Botrivier, at the foot of the majestic Houwhoek Mountains, the estate enjoys easy access to the N2, with Hermanus and Caledon just 30 minutes away. This is country living at its finest, without sacrificing convenience or connectivity.

descriptionHeader: Leopard Rock Estate, Chanteclair – Designed for Living, Across Every Generation
description:
Exclusive Sole Mandate: Set within the prestigious Leopard Rock Estate in Chanteclair, this exceptional home offers a lifestyle defined by space, privacy, and natural beauty. With only 30 residences in the estate, a rare sense of calm and community prevails — a place where life unfolds at a gentler, more refined pace. Thoughtfully designed to live comfortably on one level, the home welcomes you with immediate sea views that draw your eye across the open living areas and into the main bedroom — a breathtaking outlook that becomes part of everyday life. High ceilings enhance the feeling of openness, while the layout offers both elegance and ease. The home accommodates four generous bedrooms and three bathrooms, including a main en suite, making it ideal for families, empty nesters, or those who enjoy hosting across generations. Beneath the home, a fully self-contained flat adds valuable flexibility, perfect for extended family, guests, or independent living, all while still enjoying beautiful sea views from ground level.

Arrival is a pleasure, with two separate entrances offering choice and convenience. One leads you along a charming stone pathway through the garden, while the other allows level access from the driveway straight into the home. Dual driveways provide ample guest parking, complementing the double garage with direct access. At the heart of the home, open-plan living spaces flow effortlessly onto a sun-filled entertainment area with a built-in braai. Large sliding doors and double doors from the kitchen create seamless indoor-outdoor living, allowing the ocean backdrop and low-maintenance garden to be enjoyed year-round. The modern kitchen is both stylish and practical, featuring an island, generous workspace, a separate scullery and laundry, and a pantry designed for everyday convenience. Leopard Rock Estate is impeccably managed, offering landscaped surroundings, excellent security, and peaceful walking trails that lead into the mountains — perfect for those who value nature and outdoor living. Back-up electricity adds further peace of mind, ensuring comfort without compromise. This is a home to gather, to retreat, and to grow, thoughtfully designed for every stage of life.

descriptionHeader: Immaculate, elegant and style all in one.
description:
An entertainer's dream in Sea Avenues walking distance to the sea front. Lovely entrance that leads to spacious open plan modern granite kitchen with gas/electric stove, separate scullery/laundry, lounge, dining area that opens out to private back garden with swimming pool and small cosy reading area. 2 Bedrooms with en-suite bathrooms and guest toilet. All on the ground floor.

Upstairs your own private area with open plan TV room with gas fireplace, kitchenette, office space that opens out on balcony with some distant sea views. Spacious master bedroom with full en-suite bathroom and a dressing room to die for. Double auto garage with direct access to the house. This is a rare find in Kleinmond so make your appointment today to view.

descriptionHeader: Immaculate family home with flat in Betty's Bay.
description:
Sole Mandate - Welcome to an immaculate and inviting home in the heart of Betty’s Bay, perfectly positioned in a peaceful cul-de-sac that adds an extra sense of privacy and charm.  This property allows you to simply pack your bags and move in—ready to enjoy the serene coastal lifestyle from day one. However the furniture can also be excluded from negotiation.
Soft neutral colours paired with high-volume trusses create an airy, calming atmosphere throughout, while the open-plan living areas enhance the home’s harmonious flow. The beautifully designed kitchen features well-planned granite countertops and sleek soft-closing cupboards that cleverly conceal appliances, delivering a clean and minimalist aesthetic.
Step outside to soothing days spent by the pool or relaxing in the cosy patio area—perfect for unwinding or entertaining. This home is in pristine condition and comes equipped with an inverter system, six solar panels, and a 5kW backup battery, offering energy efficiency and peace of mind.
Three-quarters of the property is securely fenced with a motorised gate. The two garages provide generous additional space, ideal for hobbies or extra storage. Just 900 meters from the main beach, this home offers the best of coastal living with convenience at your doorstep.
A beautifully maintained studio flatlet adds further value, offering excellent rental potential or space for extended family.
Experience comfort, style, and effortless living in one exceptional property—your peaceful Betty’s Bay retreat awaits.

Residents can enjoy a laid-back lifestyle surrounded by pristine beaches, lush indigenous fynbos, and an abundance of outdoor recreational activities. From surfing and fishing to hiking and birdwatching, there's something for everyone to explore and enjoy in this idyllic coastal haven.
Don’t miss this one! Give me a call today to make your dream a reality!
Come join our community and biosphere living!

descriptionHeader: South-East facing double-storey  contemporary home
description:
Exclusive SOLE Mandate.
This property has been run to date as a rather successful AirBnB establishment thus it is on offer as a running concern/family home or a family home-you have the choice. 
The front porch shields the entrance from the weather.
A comfortable entrance welcomes one into the capacious living/dining/outdoor area with a designer kitchen, partially set aside from the living area.
Beautiful stacker doors expand the living area which has a built-in braai cum fireplace onto the private north-east facing outdoor pool/jacuzzi deck area which is protected/screened by mature/indigenous Coastal Oaks to north + east.
A passage leads one to two double bedrooms, both en suite(1 x full) and a guest loo. One of the bedrooms has sliders onto the garden while the passage has a door to the outdoor deck, too.
Leaving the living/entertainment area one heads upstairs to a private sanctuary offering 2 bedrooms, 1 en suite and study/arts and crafts room/2nd bedroom.
The living space with both south-east + north-west decks with built-in braai cum fireplace, offers a plethora of choices in the form of a TV/reading lounge/study/braai area/music corner.
Sea views abound both from street level and more so upstairs with the views from entrance/upstairs east room never to be marred.

The laundry is tucked away in a discreet cupboard.
Storage under the stairs, always a welcome offering.
Direct access between house and automated double garage protects one from the inclement weather on those wet and blustery Betty's Bay days.
Both the swimming pool and jacuzzi have fitted covers.
Blinds/Curtains are the window dressings of choice.
Security in place.
Fibre is up and alive in Betty's Bay.
All furniture, appliances can be included in the sale.
The books of the running business are available for scrutiny if that is the intention.
Stony Point is a sought after area, why wait to make 'that' call.

descriptionHeader: Calling All Visionaries, Builders & Brave Hearts!
description:
"The difference between a vision and a daydream is the audacity to act" - Steven Furtick
EXCLUSIVE MANDATE -  This is not a turnkey home — it’s a blank canvas in beautiful Pringle Bay, where mountains meet the sea and creativity is part of the lifestyle.
Set in a good, well-positioned area of the village, this architecturally creative shell offers the bones of something truly special. Electrical and plumbing still need to be installed, and existing plans will need to be amended to as-built — but for the right buyer, this is where the magic begins.
Designed for those who see opportunity where others see work, this property is ideal for an experienced builder, developer, or hands-on investor looking to add value over time. With vision, craftsmanship and a touch of audaciousness, this structure can be transformed into a striking contemporary home — perfectly suited to the relaxed coastal lifestyle Pringle Bay is known for.

Imagine shaping a home that embraces sea air, mountain light, and village living, whether as a permanent residence, a coastal retreat, or a smart long-term investment in a high-demand area.
This is not for the faint-hearted… but if you love a project, understand building, and enjoy turning potential into profit in one of the Western Cape’s most sought-after coastal villages, this could be your masterpiece in the making.
Bring your plans, your passion, and your builder’s mindset — Pringle Bay will reward the vision.
Enquire now and let’s talk about what this could become.

descriptionHeader: Luxury Coastal Living
description:
Joint Mandate
This beautifully designed home seamlessly blends luxurious comfort with functional living spaces, catering to both family needs and entertaining guests. Thoughtful architectural details and high-quality finishes are evident throughout, enhancing the overall sense of sophistication and warmth.
Natural light fills every corner of the home, thanks to expansive windows that create a bright and inviting atmosphere. The open-plan living and dining areas flow effortlessly into the kitchen, making it easy to interact with family or guests while preparing meals. Modern appliances and ample storage further contribute to the home's practical yet elegant design.
The main bedroom serves as a tranquil sanctuary, offering impressive views and expansive sliding doors that seamlessly integrate indoor and outdoor environments—providing an optimal setting for relaxation. The adjoining en suite bathroom maintains this sense of refinement through its sophisticated and elegant design.
A guest bathroom with a shower is strategically located across from the study or second bedroom, which also offers the flexibility to be converted into a third bedroom featuring its own private en suite bathroom.
On the upper level, there is a spacious bedroom featuring an en suite bathroom, offering abundant accommodation for guests with both comfort and elegance.
On the lower level, there is a large bedroom that comes with its own kitchenette and private bathroom, making it ideal for guests or elderly family members who want to stay on one floor. There's also an exterior room with an open-plan bathroom, offering visitors even more flexibility.
All rooms have air conditioning for consistent comfort year-round.
Located on the lush slopes of Onrus Mountain, Chanteclair is a desirable and affluent suburb just outside Hermanus. Thanks to its elevated location, each home enjoys sweeping views of both the sea and mountains. Encircled by fynbos and only a five-minute drive from Onrus Beach, this mountainside area is becoming increasingly popular among retirees and savvy holiday home buyers.

descriptionHeader: Beautifully renovated cottage on sub divisible land.
description:
Set in a peaceful and sought-after pocket of Westcliff, Hermanus, this stylishly renovated cottage offers a perfect blend of charm, comfort, and modern living. Thoughtfully upgraded with exceptional attention to detail, the home exudes a warm and inviting ambience throughout.

Solid oak wooden floors enhance the open-plan living and dining areas, where a combustion fireplace creates a cosy focal point for relaxed living. The contemporary open-plan kitchen features elegant ash wood finishes and integrates seamlessly with the living spaces, ideal for both everyday living and entertaining.

Large doors lead from the living areas to a wonderful private outdoor space, offering easy indoor-outdoor flow and a tranquil setting for relaxation. A charming stoep further enhances the home’s appeal, providing the perfect spot to enjoy the garden and surroundings.

The ground floor accommodates two spacious en-suite bedrooms, each complemented by beautifully appointed bathrooms. Upstairs, the third bedroom suite offers exceptional versatility, featuring a kitchenette, a comfortable living area with space for a dining table, and an en-suite bathroom. A lovely balcony extends from the upstairs living area, creating a private retreat with elevated views.

The property is set on a substantial stand, presenting exciting potential for subdivision or further development, subject to approvals. Additional features include a single garage and well-maintained outdoor areas.

This is a truly classy and character-filled home with excellent development potential, ideally suited for permanent living, a holiday retreat, or an investment opportunity in one of Hermanus' favourite areas, close to all amenities.

descriptionHeader: Langezandt Beach Front Plot for Sale
description:
Exclusive Mandate - This beachfront plot in Langezandt Fisherman’s Village offers a rare opportunity to own one of the most exclusive positions along the Struisbaai coastline. Enjoy uninterrupted sea views – even from ground level – as there are no dunes directly in front of the property.

Experience the sound of the waves, take long beach walks, and enjoy the magnificent coastal lifestyle that Langezandt has been known for over 20 years.

The estate remains one of Struisbaai’s most sought-after addresses, recognised for its charming Fisherman’s-style homes. Owners now also have the option to use alternative roof structures, as thatch is no longer the only approved choice.

Few places in South Africa offer this rare view of the sun rising over the ocean – and here, you’ll have a front-row seat.

Contact us today for more information on this exceptional property.

descriptionHeader: Location…Location with unimpeded sea views
description:
Exclusive Mandate!
Designed to allow the ultimate privacy, this amazing home offers peace and tranquillity with unimpeded ocean views. Embrace the beauty and serenity of nature right at your doorstep. Three distinct and captivating garden spaces, each offering a unique oasis for relaxation and enjoyment. The front garden offers mountain views, while the enclosed courtyard garden with electric fence boasts a pizza oven, built in braai and a private hot and cold shower. From here steps lead up to a rooftop deck, allowing one to enjoy breathtaking sunsets and all-encompassing ocean views. A spacious and versatile sea facing veranda offers ample seating areas,  ideally suited for outdoor entertaining and to relax with a sundowner while watching the amazing sunset over the bay, boasts a conveniently placed enclosed outdoor shower.  From here a private footpath with strategic seating areas along the way, leads to two Ranch gates with direct access to a small private beach.  

A double screened front door opens directly into the entrance hall. To the right a door leads to the main house where a passage opens into an open plan living and dining area fitted with a gas burning fireplace, and well-equipped cottage style kitchen with washed beech countertops. The living area flows effortlessly onto the spacious sea facing wooden deck. From the dining area a single screen door leads out to the front garden, with beautiful mountain views. A sunroom with breakfast nook and double screen sliding doors leads out to the courtyard and is located in a space opposite the living area. 

The natural flow of the L-shaped passage leads to a sea facing study nook and two guest bedrooms sharing a full bathroom across the passage. An ample sized master suite with a single screen door opens into the courtyard garden and boasts an elevated walk-in closet housing a shower, basin and toilet at one end and a basin, heated towel rack with a free-standing bath framed by a large seafacing window at the opposite end. Wake up to the bay, beach, ocean and mountain views from each of the three bedrooms in the main house

An adjoining self-contained cottage on the north side of the property is located to the left of the entrance hall. The cottage, comprising a fully functional kitchenette, living area, private bedroom and separate bathroom, opens out into the courtyard, with amazing views of Klein Hangklip Mountain. 

The property currently run as an income generating guesthouse. is fully fenced, with an automated gate, video and intercom entry and alarmed with external beams allows parking for 5 vehicles.  As a bonus the house is fitted with two LG dual inverters functioning as a heater and air conditioner. The washing machine and dryer and an extra dishwasher connection are located in the garage. A courtyard, housing the washing line and gas bottles is located behind the garage. 

Rooi Els is a small seaside village, itself a conservancy, and is located on the R44 Clarence Drive between Gordons Bay and Pringle Bay in the Western Cape province of SA.

descriptionHeader: A rare investment opportunity that should not be missed!
description:
DUAL MANDATE 

This commercial property is also zoned as residential and can easily be converted to a residential property. 

A mere two hour drive from Cape Town, in the heart of the Cape Overberg region lies the little hamlet of Baardskeerdersbos - or B'Bos as locals fondly refer to the area. 

Baardskeerdersbos is incorporated by farmlands and hills draped in fynbos. Its rural charm attracts nature enthusiasts and adventurers alike, offering many activities such as hiking, birdwatching, and horseback riding.

Located on a 1,067 sqm corner erf, this historic old post-office was recently refurbished into a coffee shop and art gallery and is an ideal opportunity for a multi-purpose investment.  Zoned as residential, business and agricultural, this property can be maintained as a coffee shop and gallery or with some imagination and a few internal changes, be turned into business and a one or two bedroom home. Easily a deli/gallery/home or weekend/holiday retreat.

The building of 130 sqm has several open plan rooms and folding glass doors to the coffee shop area. The fully equipped coffee shop with state of the art coffee machine, crockery and tables and chairs are all included. 

A separate ablution building of 10 sqm contains a washbasin and two toilets.

descriptionHeader: Greenbelt in front...only 400m to Beach Entrance
description:

Prime Location!  Discover this beautifully maintained 36-year-old family property, ideally situated less than 400 meters from the beach entrance. This property presents a fantastic lock-up-and-go lifestyle with the potential for dual living options. Enjoy the serene, fully fenced garden featuring manicured lawns, perfect for relaxation while taking in stunning mountain views.

As you enter, you are greeted by a spacious entrance hall that flows into a generous living and dining area, complemented by a stylish white open-plan kitchenette. Two sliding doors provide seamless access to the secure and private back garden. Right next to the living space, an inviting enclosed boma/braai room awaits, accessible through a separate entrance and adorned with charming old-world shutter windows, adding character and warmth to the space. Completing this level are two spacious bedrooms—one main bedroom facing the mountains, featuring a luxurious corner bath and basin (please note, no toilet), and a second bedroom that shares a separate guest bathroom.

Upstairs Features:
Ascend to the upper level, where you will find a bright, airy open-plan living, dining, and kitchen area with a convenient central island. The dining area includes a built-in braai and cozy seating nook, perfect for entertaining. The master suite offers a comfortable pajama lounge that flows into the bedroom, along with a striking clear glass ensuite bathroom (also without a toilet) tucked in one corner. Sliding doors in the master suite lead to a private balcony showcasing breathtaking panoramic mountain views.

Additional Highlights:
All bedrooms feature built-in cupboards, and the property is equipped with modern amenities, including two gas geysers, elegant tiled and laminated flooring, and durable aluminium windows. A single garage with a manual roll-up door ensures secure parking, while the property benefits from a reliable alarm system with 24-hour response for your peace of mind.

This delightful home combines comfort, character, and convenience, making it a perfect haven for families and beach lovers alike. 

Don’t miss out on the opportunity to make it yours!

descriptionHeader: Tranquil Luxury with Unimpeded Ocean Views
description:
Dual Mandate.

Immerse yourself in a slice of paradise where rocks and fynbos create a stunning natural garden, just steps away from the soft sandy shores. This thoughtfully designed home appears to be cradled by the water's edge, providing an unparalleled connection to the ocean. Adding to the property’s allure, a lush greenbelt ensures the utmost privacy with no neighbors on one side, allowing you to savor the serenity of your surroundings.

As you enter, you're greeted by breathtaking ocean views that set the tone for ultimate relaxation and tranquility. The open layout enhances the flow between the spacious bedrooms and inviting living areas, ensuring comfort and ease for family and guests alike.

Elegant double front doors lead into a grand entrance hall, transitioning seamlessly to an impressive home office and the main lounge. Stylish wooden stacker doors offer the flexibility to separate the formal lounge from the well-appointed, cottage-style kitchen and dining area. The family room, also featuring stacker doors, provides a bright and airy space that connects the heart of the home to the beauty of the sea.

The master suite is a private sanctuary, located in its own tranquil wing. This spacious retreat boasts stunning views of the ocean and garden, a generously sized dressing room with floor-to-ceiling built-in cupboards, and a luxurious full bathroom featuring a double vanity. Bedroom two, with mountain views, is conveniently located off the left side of the study, while bedrooms three and four are nestled between the lounge and open plan living area, sharing a well-appointed full bathroom.

The property includes three extra-length automated garages, providing direct access to the kitchen and an additional bathroom perfect for rinsing off the sea salt and sand after a day of fun on the water.

A wrap-around sea-facing veranda offers generous seating areas to unwind and soak in the coastal vistas. Accessed conveniently from both the lounge and a separate entrance through the dining room, this outdoor oasis is perfect for entertaining or simply enjoying the soothing sounds of the ocean.

This remarkable home captures the essence of coastal living, combining elegance, functionality, and breathtaking views—making it a true dream come true.

The sea-facing master suite, accessed from the dining area, offers stunning ocean and mountain views. This tranquil retreat features a spacious bedroom with an intimate lounging space positioned within the bow window space, a dressing room, and an ensuite bathroom for ultimate comfort.

An elegant sweeping staircase leads you to the upper level, where two guest suites await:

Suite Two: The second suite features direct access to two expansive verandas, an ensuite bathroom, and a compact kitchenette.

As an added bonus, this exceptional property includes , three grey water tanks for eco-friendly water management, and ample storage space under the house. 

Seize this opportunity to own a stunning home that combines luxury and practicality, perfectly suited for families or as a lucrative rental option. Your coastal oasis awaits!

Light, bright and inviting, the home offers two well-appointed bedrooms.  The main bedroom features an en-suite bathroom, while the second bathroom is fitted with its own basin and toilet, ideal for guests and family.
Thoughtfully designed for both relaxation and entertaining, the home welcomes you through the front door into an enclosed verandah with beautiful views and a built-in braai – an ideal space to enjoy the fresh coastal evenings.  From here, the home flows into an open-plan living area and a fully functional kitchen equipped with a gas hob and bic’s.
Additional features include a single garage with an additional workshop space, an inverter to provide backup power supply, a single carport providing ample parking, and a fully walled property ensuring privacy and security. The back yard is also complimented by a low-maintenance garden and private back patio, ideal for outdoor relaxation.
Perfectly positioned in Pearly Beach, this is property is ideal for buyers searching for a coastal lifestyle property, a holiday home by the sea or retirement option.
Pearly Beach offers an unparalleled retreat for those seeking the perfect blend of natural beauty and modern comfort with its pristine beaches, stunning whale watching opportunities, and abundant angling prospects.  Despite its remote feel, the Village is conveniently located near essential services, with Gansbaai being a mere 21kms away where you can find all the necessities without compromising your peaceful seclusion.  Whether you’re seeking permanent residence, a vacation home, or a lucrative rental property, this coastal gem has it all.

The main bedroom with en-suite is a sanctuary of its own bright, airy, and wrapped in panoramic views with a private patio access. The second bedroom works beautifully as a single room or a dedicated study, depending on your lifestyle needs.
